parameters.query:
SELECT
  cp.id as plan_id,
  cp.plan_data->>'opportunity_name' as opp_name,
  cp.plan_data->>'gate_stage' as gate_stage,
  cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date' as gate_review_date,
  cp.plan_data->>'capture_manager' as capture_manager,
  cp.plan_data->>'pwwin' as pwin,
  cp.plan_data->>'teaming_partner' as teaming_partner,
  cp.updated_at,
  ot.id as opp_id,
  ot.opp_title,
  ot.agency,
  ot.estimated_value,
  ot.response_deadline,
  (ot.response_deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE) as days_to_proposal,
  -- Classify alert type
  CASE
    WHEN cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date' IS NOT NULL
      AND (cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date')::date = CURRENT_DATE THEN 'gate_review_today'
    WHEN cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date' IS NOT NULL
      AND (cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date')::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE + 1 AND CURRENT_DATE + 7 THEN 'gate_review_week'
    WHEN ot.response_deadline IS NOT NULL
      AND ot.response_deadline::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + 14 THEN 'proposal_deadline_soon'
    WHEN cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date' IS NOT NULL
      AND (cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date')::date < CURRENT_DATE THEN 'gate_review_overdue'
    WHEN cp.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' THEN 'capture_stale'
    ELSE NULL
  END as alert_type
FROM gda_capture_plans cp
LEFT JOIN gda_opportunity_tracker ot ON ot.id::text = cp.plan_data->>'opp_id'
WHERE ot.gda_label IN ('PURSUE','EVALUATE')
  AND (
    (cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date' IS NOT NULL AND (cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date')::date <= CURRENT_DATE + 7)
    OR (ot.response_deadline IS NOT NULL AND ot.response_deadline::date <= CURRENT_DATE + 14)
    OR (cp.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND ot.gda_label = 'PURSUE')
  )
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date' IS NOT NULL THEN (cp.plan_data->>'gate_review_date')::date END ASC NULLS LAST,
  ot.response_deadline ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 15;

INSERT INTO gda_intelligence_log (category, finding, source, agency, created_at)
SELECT 'capture_milestone', {{ $json.alert_type + ': ' + ($json.opp_name || $json.opp_title) }}, 'capture-milestone-alerts', {{ $json.agency || 'internal' }}, NOW()
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM gda_intelligence_log
  WHERE source = 'capture-milestone-alerts'
  AND finding = {{ $json.alert_type + ': ' + ($json.opp_name || $json.opp_title) }}
  AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'
)

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{status:'ok', message:'No capture milestones due in the next 14 days', checked_at: new Date().toISOString()}}];
